inputs.idea: Use ChatGPT/GPT Image 2 to help marketplace sellers optimize product display images.
inputs.targetUserCandidate: Taobao, JD, Amazon/AWS, and cross-border ecommerce sellers.
inputs.painfulSituation: Sellers need compliant, high-converting product image sets for each marketplace and SKU.
inputs.currentWorkaround: Manual photo editing, outsourcing to ecommerce image editors, using generic AI image tools, or repeatedly revising images after platform rejection.
inputs.desiredOutcome: Upload one raw product photo and receive marketplace-ready main, lifestyle, detail, and comparison images.
constraints: AWS likely means Amazon marketplace; clarify if the user meant Amazon Web Services.
Taobao and JD official image rules need seller-console/manual verification.
Generated images must not misrepresent product appearance, quantity, packaging, or claims.
